from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_7e0986d6(I):
    x1 = leastcolor(I)
    x2 = ofcolor(I, x1)
    x3 = replace(I, x1, ZERO)
    x4 = leastcolor(x3)
    x5 = rbind(colorcount, x4)
    x6 = chain(positive, decrement, x5)
    x7 = rbind(toobject, x3)
    x8 = chain(x6, x7, dneighbors)
    x9 = sfilter(x2, x8)
    O = fill(x3, x4, x9)
    return O
